editMemberInformation: Administrators of this agenda require some additional information to allow them to contact you in case of need
removeMemberInformation: If you remove yourself from the agenda, you will stop receiving notifications and will no longer be able to edit your events nor add new events. The agenda will stop appearing in your home screen.
welcomeMessage: You can join agendas that are open to contribution or create your own agenda.
openAgendasOfMoment: The agendas of the moment open to contributions :
selectAgenda: Select an agenda in which to create the event
noEventsCreated: You haven't created any event yet
